name: HelloDevicePod
summary: Zero-config pod that shows a "Hello — [Device Name]" banner on every screen.
description:
HelloDevicePod is a zero-configuration iOS library that automatically
displays a beautiful floating "Hello — [Device Name]" banner on every
screen of your app — no setup code required.

Simply add `pod 'HelloDevicePod'` to your Podfile and install.
The banner appears automatically on first launch.

Features:
• Zero configuration — works out of the box
• Detects real hardware model name (e.g. "iPhone 16 Pro Max")
• Glassmorphism floating pill design
• Full dark/light mode support
• 100% touch passthrough — never blocks your UI
• Supports iOS 13+, iPadOS 13+, Mac Catalyst
• Customisable prefix, position (top/bottom), and message
